emails.subject: Congratulations!!! You WON $1,000,000
emails.body: Click here NOW to claim your prize. URGENT: send your bank password to verify identity. Act within 1 hour!!!

emails.subject: Time for a project discussion
emails.body: Hi, are you free today? I'd like to sync on quarterly project progress.

emails.subject: Order #88291 has shipped
emails.body: Your order has been handed to the carrier and should arrive within two days. This message was sent automatically—please do not reply.

emails.subject: [URGENT] Unusual sign-in on your account
emails.body: We detected suspicious activity. Click the link immediately to verify your identity and re-link your bank card, or your account will be frozen within 24 hours. Do not tell anyone.

emails.subject: Meeting notes
emails.body: Hi, could you send me the notes from last Friday's weekly meeting? I need them for my weekly report. Thanks.
